description: Happy-path fixture. Synthetic runtime advisory list carries zero high/critical entries; synthetic runtime license inventory is on the allowlist; toolchain succeeds. The Todo 13 validator runs the four scripts and the four npm scripts and emits SECURITY READY exit 0. No real owner / user / environment data; every entry is a synthetic placeholder so the validator shape can be exercised deterministically.

audit.note: No runtime advisories at or above 'high' severity on this fixture.
